_meta.description: Integrity map for data banks. Stores expected SHA-256 checksums per bank path and optional per-env overrides. Used at boot (and optionally in CI) to detect drift, partial restores, or accidental edits.

notes: Populate checksums via CI script after bank generation.
Checksum is for file content only (excluding file path).
Use bank_registry.path as the canonical key.

envOverrides._comment: Optional: override checksum strictness behavior per environment.

cases.assert: all checksums keys correspond to some bank_registry.path (or are explicitly allowed extra)
all banks with requiredByEnv.production==true have checksum entries
